data.prompt: Continue your previous task from where you left off. Re-read the file(s) you were editing and any build output if you need to refresh context, then keep going and finish with the usual brief report.

text: Let me refresh context — verify my orientation claims still hold and locate the blueprint source tree before finalizing.

input.command:
AJC=/home/Axel/LeanAlgebraicGeometry-Horizon/MainProjects/Algebraic-Jacobian-Challenge
echo "=== blueprint source tree ==="
find $AJC/blueprint -maxdepth 3 -name '*.tex' 2>/dev/null | head -40
echo "=== genus-0 / Route-C in blueprint .tex source ==="
grep -rln -i 'genus.0\|genus-0\|genus zero\|Genus0BaseObjects\|genusZero_curve_iso_P1\|route.c\|route-c' $AJC/blueprint/src 2>/dev/null | head
echo "=== current open info items ==="
"$HORIZON_BIN" inbox list --json 2>/dev/null | python3 -c "
import json,sys
d=json.load(sys.stdin)
for i in d['items']:
    if i['status']=='open' and i['kind']=='info': print(i['id'], i.get('audience'))
"
echo "=== DAG dangling for AJC ==="
"$HORIZON_BIN" leandag --help 2>&1 | grep -iE 'dangling|status|cone|summary' | head
input.description: Locate blueprint source, check genus-0 in tex, DAG cmd
